summary: M4 march execution, supply state, and reinforcement timing task is CLOSED after accepted implementation entered origin/main through PR #92 with all required CI checks passing. Child threads were closed, M4-AUTO-ENGAGEMENT-SIEGE-001 was promoted to READY, and goal-mode state now points at the next M4 task.

tests_run.result: Both required PR Gate jobs passed.

decisions: Closed only after PR #92 entered origin/main at the verified main commit.
Promoted the dependency-ready automatic engagement/siege task to READY without modifying product code.
Recorded save-format omission as an explicit future M4 save/runtime concern rather than hidden scope here.

requested_action: Start M4-AUTO-ENGAGEMENT-SIEGE-001 immediately under Autonomous Goal Mode.
